subject: good and bad
body:
Jeffrey

in a mixed state

on the up side i now have an excellent agent, am adding two chapters to my expanded memoir that deal with 1. my first five famous papers and 2. my work on genetic conflict within ourselves; so there is a good chance i can sell the book by this summer to a publisher and start reaping some money off it

a friend at Cornell has now contacted me regarding a special senior fellowship they have and i remain hopeful that i will soon be relaxing with the famously beautiful women of Aarhus by late September

---

on the downside, Jamaica is increasingly dangerous, murder rate climbing once again, about 6th highest in world

and i encounter a lot of racism, especially from young thugs—not so much hostility as disrespect—they regard me as an easy target—that old white man nah know nothing, we can rob him or do as we please

yesterday morning at 7am very hostile encounter at an ATM machine, no overt attempt to rob me or i would have shot him dead, just cursing me and my mother out because he had to wait an extra minute or two while i did my transaction—all my Jamaican male friends agree that he would not have acted that way toward a dark-skinned man

makes me reluctant so spend so much time here or to continue to invest in my property

---

i hope you are fine, the Trump bump in the market seems to have stalled and i would be curious what you thought of the market over the next three years—i will be forcibly retired July 1 but as long as i have 'employment' (equals fellowships at the moment) for a couple of years i need not spend my retirement money which will be roughly $900,000; at most i might put 450 grand in an annuity and keep the rest invested

all the best

bob

on the up side i now have an excellent agent, am adding two chapters to my expanded memoir that deal with 1. my first five famous papers and 2. my work on genetic conflict within ourselves; so there is a good chance i can sell the book by this summer to a publisher and start reaping some money off it

and i encounter a lot of racism, especially from young thugs—not so much hostility as disrespect—they regard me as an easy target—that old white man nah know nothing, we can rob him or do as we please
